scenarios.prompt: Find the definition of `Button` and list every file where it is rendered.
Identify all props accepted by `Button` and find exactly where the data for the `isLoading` prop originates in `LoginForm`.
Find all usages of the `useUser` hook and list every component that depends on the `user.data.role` field of the returned object.

Refactor the `Button` component in `src/components/ui/button/button.tsx` to move its `ButtonProps` interface into a new file `src/components/ui/button/types.ts` and export it from there. Update the `Button` component to import it.
scenarios.verification_command: npx prettier --write src && ESLINT_USE_FLAT_CONFIG=false npm run lint -- --fix
